{{Quote|I have the same choices as anyone: I can run or I can fight. I have experienced both.|[[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Sekot]]|<ref name="Reunion" />}}
A '''battle''' was fought between the living [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] and the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

The Yuuzhan Vong fleet that attacked Zonama Sekot was a small one and consisted of two mid-sized cruiser analogs and their Coralskipper escorts. However, Zonama Sekot fought back with [[Zonama Sekotan fighter|ships of its own]]. The battle was fierce, with the Yuuzhan Vong holding out against the planetary defenses for a while. In the end, the Zonama Sekotan defenses succeeded in overwhelming the Yuuzhan Vong force and hunted down the remaining ships. Towards the end of the battle, the ''[[Jade Shadow]]'' and the [[Imperial Remnant]] frigate [[Widowmaker (frigate)|''Widowmaker'']] arrived. Zonama Sekot than unleashed a wall of psychic energy that knocked the crew of the ''Jade Shadow'' unconscious. This wave did not target the ''Widowmaker'' though it caused some of her crew of headaches and spacesickness. Upon waking up, the ''Jade Shadow''{{'s}} crew found that they had landed on Zonama Sekot. They were greeted by the planet's [[Ferroan]] [[Magister]] [[Jabitha Hal|Jabitha]]. Meanwhile the ''Widowmaker'' stayed in orbit around the living world where it would not be harmed. [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Ekh'm Val]], meanwhile, fled to [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane]], and revealed to him Zonama Sekot's existence.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}}
